---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, Element type, template, or provider
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Receiptd doesn't currently support?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. If this touches the Receipt model, the
REST API, or the package layout, please sketch what you have in mind (a
new Element type's JSON shape, a new endpoint, etc.) — see
[docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](../../docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) for the current design.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches, workarounds, or existing features that
partially cover this.

## Is this a change to the frozen architecture?

- [ ] No — this fits the existing package layout, interfaces, and Receipt
      model as documented in `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`.
- [ ] Yes — this would require changing an interface, package boundary, or
      core model documented in `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md`. If so, please read
      "How architectural changes should be proposed" in
      [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) before opening this issue.

## Additional context

Anything else — links, mockups, similar features in other tools.
